subcodes.first_line: O concourse of humanity! The gate of divine generosity hath been opened in the Most Great Scene. Turn ye unto it with humility and penitence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا معشر البشر قد فتح باب الکرم فی المنظر الاکبر توجهوا الیه بخضوع و اناب قد
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @proclamation to the people of the world, @light and darkness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @chastisement and requital
